disease.name: Disease Outbreak
disease.description: Illness spreads through settlements, thinning labor and fraying nerves.

livestock_plague.name: Livestock Plague
livestock_plague.description: A contagion tears through herds and flocks.

crop_blight.name: Crop Blight
crop_blight.description: Fungus and rot sweep the fields before harvest.

fishery_collapse.name: Fishery Collapse
fishery_collapse.description: Coastal stocks crash — empty nets and idle boats along the shore.

insect_swarm.name: Insect Swarm
insect_swarm.description: Clouds of pests strip leaves and grain from the fields.

invasive_species.name: Invasive Species
invasive_species.description: An outsider species takes root, quietly taxing forests, farms, or shores.

red_tide.name: Red Tide
red_tide.description: Toxic algal bloom stains coastal waters and kills fish in droves.
